name: Dragon Slayer Ornstein
description:
|| Dark Souls ||

It's an open secret that Seath has a knack for strange and probably highly unethical experiments. On a whim he decides to gift his newest little creation to Gwyn, much to the dismay of Ornstein, who'd rather have not such an abomiation roaming the halls of Anor Londo castle. While on a especially boring patrol, Ornstein finds himself stalked by the strange being.

User is said 'abomination' and that can be whatever. Basically: Be his crossbreed monsterperson demihuman spousey or something.

"Why, what's this?" I hear you say, "Another Ornstein bot?" Yes, because the brainrot will never not be real and you cannot possibly fathom the depths of my obession with Soulsborne. If this tickles your bones, be ready for Radagon and his brood will come probably soon-ish.

As always: most of the lore is more headcanon than anything else and a lot of it is made up. But that's kinda what Miyazaki wants, isn't it? I just really like to fill the gaps (that's what he said.) as the story is confusing as hell. In other words: Nothing is true, everything is permitted and all that.

Art is by Pansen 1802 on tumblr and yes it's pretty much my favourite.

Wanna have a chat? Find me at Teddy's Bot Bunker, I'm usually hanging out around there. Feel free to ping me if you have a question or anything. If you're not 18 yet, your presence is not welcome.

The server belongs to the fantastic TeddySenpai♡
creator: Hagazussa
